sections.title: After The Hand in the Sand

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bert! Good news!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Arrr...Good news be always handy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They arrested Sandy for the murder of a wizard and the sand pit now refills itself!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: ME JOB! I'VE LOSTED ME JOB! 'ow c'n yer say tha' be good news?? Me wife'll tear me limb fr'm limb!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, the Wizards are going to pay you a large pension so that you can retire...

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Bu' wha'll I be doin' wit' me day now! I be lovin' tha sand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What will you do with your day? Well....You could build sand castles with your own two hands!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: I din't think so... bu' iffen yer ever need someone ta haul buckets o'sand 'round, ye be lettin' me know [player name], I's can help yer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow! That would be great, buckets of sand direct to bank everday you say? That's great!

sections.title: Subsequent times following completion of The Hand in the Sand

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: 'Ello there [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you deliver my sand to my bank, please?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Aye, give me a minute cause I be rushed off me feet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Bert, could I have my sand today please?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Aye, give me a minute cause I be rushed off me feet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the sand Bert!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: 'Ello there [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hope you're having a good day!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Oh arr, no' too bad, though sometoimes, I could do wi' a second pair o' hands! I'll be gettin' on movin' them there buckets o' sand to yer bank!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks Bert, see you tomorrow!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: I'll ge' on wi' movin' it. Thankee fer makin' sure Sandy go' it in t'neck fer 'is double dealin's!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Eeee, ye've go' no free space in yon bank [player name]. Make some room 'tween the fishes 'n boots fore ye come back ta me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll make some more space in my bank and come back!

lines.speaker: If the Player has already claimed their sand for the day
Player
lines.text: Did you already give me some sand today?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Yep, I dropped it off a while ago. Mebbe come back tomorrow fer some more.

lines.speaker: If the Player has completed the Elite Ardougne Diary
Player
lines.text: Please don't notify me when you deliver sand.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Aye, when I take yer bucket o' sand to yer bank each day, I'll not bother ye wi' any messages 'bout it. Ye'll just find yer sand in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you notify me when you deliver sand?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Aye, when I takes yer bucket o' sand to yer bank each day, I'll drop ye a message ter tell yer 'bout it, so ye knows I been workin'!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I no longer want sand deliveries.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Suits me, [Player Name]! I be a wee bi' busy, an' I'll happily stop takin' sand to yer bank for ye. Come an' see me if ye changes yer mind.

lines.speaker: Talking to Bert after disabling daily sand deliveries
Bert
lines.text: 'Ello there [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like daily sand deliveries again.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Aye, ye bin a big help to me, an I'll be 'appy to take yer sand to yer bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see you another time.
